title: Unlock the Future: Build AI Telephony Agents with VideoSDK!
description: In this comprehensive guide, we explore how to harness the power of VideoSDK to create AI telephony agents using the Agent SDK. This video will walk you through a step-by-step process to set up your own AI telephony agent locally, enabling you to integrate seamlessly with the global telephone network via SIP providers like Twilio. Discover how to implement a Routing Rule that directs incoming calls to your self-hosted AI agent for efficient processing. You'll learn how to manage both inbound and outbound phone calls, ensuring your AI agent can handle real-world scenarios effectively. We’ll cover the essential project structure, including the main script, dependency file, and environment configuration needed to kickstart your project. Please note that Python 3.12 or higher is required to run the project, and you will need a VideoSDK account to obtain your VIDEOSDK_TOKEN for authentication. By the end of this video, you'll have the knowledge and tools to unlock the future of communication technology with your very own AI telephony agent. Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more tech tutorials!
